g.text: 2nd Stage body comes with air valve assy which can be retrofitted onto models without the air valve. Subsequent stage
Washer cup part number 13666 - quantity of 1 required for HM60 & HM90 models (fitted to drive end side only)
Washer cup part number 13693 - quantity of 2 required for HM160 & HM270 models (fitted to drive end & pump end).
bodies have the air hole which can also be retrofitted onto models that do not have the air valve already fitted.
Quantity of 2 required for HM270 models (fitted to drive end & pump end)
